description: You are a neurologist assessing a brain MRI for possible normal pressure hydrocephalus (NPH) in an elderly patient presenting with the classic triad of gait instability, urinary incontinence, and cognitive decline. Using the MRI loaded in Weasis from /home/ga/DICOM/studies/brain_mri_nph/, conduct a standard NPH morphometric assessment to determine if findings are consistent with ventriculomegaly. The assessment must include the Evans index, third ventricle evaluation, and temporal horn measurements. Export annotated measurement images to /home/ga/DICOM/exports/evans_index_measurement.png and save a structured neurometrics report containing all measurements and your clinical determination to /home/ga/DICOM/exports/nph_assessment_report.txt.

metadata.clinical_scenario: Normal pressure hydrocephalus assessment with Evans index
